backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a shoe marketplace with functions to create listings, filter/retrieve listings, view user profiles with trade stats, and record completed trades with ratings.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping implemented feature IDs to their titles, affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs for app rebranding, retheme, and negotiation page features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure and purpose of each file.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes using Tailwind's base layer, with a neutral/grayscale palette and a red destructive color.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Shoe Swapper' that loads Barlow Condensed and Inter fonts from Google Fonts and mounts the React app via Vite.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with routes for Home, Marketplace, CreateListing, Profile, and Negotiation pages, all wrapped in the shared Layout component.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App-wide layout component with a sticky header branded as 'ShoeSwapper', navigation links including Negotiation, a 'List for Trade' CTA button, and a responsive mobile menu, all styled in red/black/white.
frontend/src/components/ListingCard.tsx: Shoe listing card component displaying photo, condition badge, authenticity shield, star rating, and price breakdown with commission, styled in the red/black/white theme.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAIAnalysis.ts: Custom React hook that simulates AI shoe analysis with a delay, returning a random condition score (40-98) and authenticity result (75% authentic).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching/creating shoe listings, fetching user profiles, and completing trades via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind, defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system, and adds utility classes for glow effects and card hover animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CreateListing.tsx: Multi-step page component for creating a shoe listing: handles image upload, triggers AI analysis, collects price/name, and submits the listing to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page component displaying a hero section, feature highlights, and a step-by-step how-it-works guide for the sneaker trading platform.
frontend/src/pages/Marketplace.tsx: Marketplace page that fetches and displays shoe listings with filtering by condition score range and authenticity status, plus navigation to create a new listing.
frontend/src/pages/Negotiation.tsx: Negotiation/messaging page with a hardcoded list of trade conversations, allowing users to select a conversation and send messages in a chat interface.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: User profile page displaying demo trader stats (trade count, rating, credibility scores) and a button to navigate to the listing creation flow.
frontend/src/utils/pricing.ts: Utility functions for calculating a 10% commission fee and formatting cent-based prices as USD currency strings, with BigInt variants.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a red/black/white brand color palette, custom display/body fonts, box shadows, and animations for the street-culture aesthetic.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the Shoe Swapper platform's features, architecture, theme, and known issues at schema version 1.0.0 / state version 5.
